description: This pipeline performs image processing and analysis, starting from raw data and applying various filtering operations such as blurring, thresholding, and morphological transformations to extract meaningful features and structures. The processed images then undergo further refinement, including color conversions, overlaying, and dimensionality reduction, ultimately leading to the export of the results in a suitable format. Along the way, specific regions of interest are identified, masked, and filled, allowing for detailed examination and quantification of image content. Overall, the pipeline aims to enhance, transform, and extract valuable information from input images through a series of carefully sequenced operations.

874a0b0e-1787-4a9a-93b7-ffa38be18ad1.name: ij1-dimensions-zproject-2
874a0b0e-1787-4a9a-93b7-ffa38be18ad1.description: Performs a Z-Projection. Also supports other axes C-Project/T-Project.

9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

3820f7c0-b777-41fd-8207-51485e27105d.name: ij1-dimensions-zproject-2
3820f7c0-b777-41fd-8207-51485e27105d.description: Performs a Z-Projection. Also supports other axes C-Project/T-Project.

677633d8-6a7e-46d2-b524-57b6366a7c36.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
677633d8-6a7e-46d2-b524-57b6366a7c36.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

8dcb2a71-decc-4ff8-b2e1-e3972af29680.name: ij1-math-fast-image-arithmetics
8dcb2a71-decc-4ff8-b2e1-e3972af29680.description:
Applies standard arithmetic and logical operations including, addition, subtraction, division, multiplication, GAMMA, EXP, LOG, SQR, SQRT, ABS, AND, OR, XOR, minimum, maximum, and more.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

5b9a2c6e-02cc-426d-a725-8bd923bb8d07.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
5b9a2c6e-02cc-426d-a725-8bd923bb8d07.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

fd1fc887-4a2d-4333-be70-450b82171a7b.name: ij1-blur-median2d
fd1fc887-4a2d-4333-be70-450b82171a7b.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

d5b3825f-f543-4225-82b8-7997e181f11d.name: ij1-color-blend-images
d5b3825f-f543-4225-82b8-7997e181f11d.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cbf53217-72f1-475d-b94a-5e5645515220.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
cbf53217-72f1-475d-b94a-5e5645515220.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

603b91f3-1aaf-4d8c-a0ad-caf489d8b9c4.name: ij1-labels-to-mask
603b91f3-1aaf-4d8c-a0ad-caf489d8b9c4.description: Converts a label image to a mask

643fc042-53d3-4e97-8d22-a5ed3beea1e6.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
643fc042-53d3-4e97-8d22-a5ed3beea1e6.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

fc3fbaea-ed7c-486e-bb64-e663424853a2.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
fc3fbaea-ed7c-486e-bb64-e663424853a2.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

0333971d-7f94-4a16-876e-2edc9bf92555.name: iji-export-image-v2
0333971d-7f94-4a16-876e-2edc9bf92555.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9fe7de37-19e1-46f9-803e-baec1b5675fc.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
9fe7de37-19e1-46f9-803e-baec1b5675fc.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

3466faea-d7cd-466e-b023-d559a0e347f3.name: ij3d-labels-to-roi
3466faea-d7cd-466e-b023-d559a0e347f3.description: Converts a label image into 3D ROI

6df75662-428a-4ed0-872d-6215e3c3809a.name: ij1-feature-orientationj-2d
6df75662-428a-4ed0-872d-6215e3c3809a.description: Extracts various orientation-related features from the input image. These are the same features as produced by the OrientationJ Analysis.

763a2deb-3243-4a45-b885-81c20a7dce69.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
763a2deb-3243-4a45-b885-81c20a7dce69.description:

d6f6b408-4be1-4e01-9942-f55de1d2edb9.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
d6f6b408-4be1-4e01-9942-f55de1d2edb9.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

4f2ad6aa-09e3-4c69-b871-7b2f85c2f91a.name: ij3d-segmentation-watershed-3d
4f2ad6aa-09e3-4c69-b871-7b2f85c2f91a.description:
The 3D Watershed operation works with two images, one containing the seeds of the objects, that can be obtained from local maxima (see 3D filters), the other image containing signal data. A first threshold1 is used for seeds (only seeds with value > threshold1 will be used). A second threshold is used to cluster voxels with values > threshold2. In this implementation voxels are clustered to seeds in descending order of voxel values.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

3ed7fb17-1835-4040-ba8c-7fca697981d2.name: ij1-color-to-rgb
3ed7fb17-1835-4040-ba8c-7fca697981d2.description: Converts the incoming image to RGB. This applies the LUT if any is set. Compared to the image converter node, this operation renders the image into a representation equivalent to an image viewer, meaning that contrast settings are preserved.
